assumption_text: The bounded episode includes El Mozote and the nearby places named in the Court's fact pattern during 11-13 December 1981.
rationale: The sources treat these killings as a single successive massacre sequence inside one short military operation.

assumption_text: The rounded figure of approximately 1,000 deaths is carried as an event total without pretending to be a fully reconciled body count.
rationale: The source itself gives an approximate total, and widening beyond that would add invented precision.

assumption_text: Military participation counts are retained as context only and not converted into a formal denominator.
rationale: No same-episode combatant-victim total is available, so turning participation counts into DR components would be misleading.
